heading: This Afternoon
text: Partly sunny south; partly cloudy north, except mostly sunny in the St. Lawrence Valley. Highs from the mid 50s to lower 60s, with some mid 60s in southern valleys. North to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mainly clear north; periods of clouds in the south. Lows in the low to mid 30s, with some upper 20s in northern cold hollows, and some upper 30s far south, and in the Champlain Valley. Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly sunny. Highs from the mid 60s to around 70, some lower 60s northeast and in the Adirondacks. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph.
